code: import React from'react';import{Link}from'react-router-dom';import'./MangaCard.css';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MangaCard=_ref=>{let{manga}=_ref;return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs(Link,{to:"/content/".concat(manga.id),className:"manga-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-image",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("img",{src:manga.cover,alt:manga.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"image-overlay",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"overlay-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-play"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:"\u0427\u0438\u0442\u0430\u0442\u044C"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"card-badge",children:manga.type})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-content",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{className:"card-title",children:manga.title}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"card-author",children:manga.author}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"card-stats",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-star"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:manga.rating})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-book"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{children:[manga.chapters," \u0433\u043B."]})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"stat",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"fas fa-eye"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("span",{children:formatNumber(manga.views)})]})]})]})]});};const formatNumber=num=>{if(num>=1000000){return(num/1000000).toFixed(1)+'M';}if(num>=1000){return(num/1000).toFixed(1)+'K';}return num.toString();};export default MangaCard;
